User.title: User
User.description: A user of the VedaFlow application.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who completed the practice.

exerciseId.description: The unique identifier of the exercise.

durationSeconds.description: The duration of the practice session in seconds.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the practice session was completed.
